overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking along a mountain trail at night. The scene features rocky cliffs, Mediterranean vegetation, distant snow-capped mountains, and a brief encounter with a wild goat crossing the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail at night, passing a campfire illuminating the rocky cliff on the left

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with rough texture forming the left boundary of the trail
warm orange light from a campfire illuminating the base of the cliff
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible against the night sky
uneven dirt path winding through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow mountain trail at night, bordered by a steep rocky cliff face on the left where a campfire burns. The camera moves forward along the dirt path, with distant snow-capped mountains visible ahead against the dark blue sky.

events.description: passing beyond the campfire, transitioning from mixed lighting to pure moonlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through a more forested section of the mountain

entered.detail: dense Mediterranean pine and olive trees lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the campfire area, the trail opens into a forested section with trees on both sides. The lighting shifts to cool moonlight as the rocky cliff falls behind, while the distant mountains remain visible ahead.

events.description: wild goat suddenly runs across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail when a goat suddenly crosses the path ahead

notable_agents.action: wild goat running across the dirt path from right to left, disappearing into the bushes

entered.detail: warm torch lights from a distant village or camp visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest as the camera approaches a distant settlement with visible torchlight. A wild goat suddenly darts across the path from right to left, adding a moment of wildlife interaction to the serene night walk.

agents.ego_description: approaching the outskirts of the settlement, with buildings becoming visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall slender cypress tree standing prominently in the center of the path ahead
ancient Greek-style buildings with lit torches becoming visible through the clearing

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the trail approaches the settlement. A tall cypress tree dominates the center of the view while the distant village with its warm lights becomes more prominent. The terrain feels more open and the destination is clearly visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal mountain trail that transitions from a rugged cliffside into a forested path leading toward a distant settlement. It begins on a narrow dirt path bordered by a steep rocky cliff where a campfire burns, with snow-capped mountains looming under a dark blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the rocky terrain gives way to a forested section bathed in cool moonlight, keeping the distant peaks in view. The scene then continues through the trees as a wild goat suddenly darts across the path, just as the warm glow of torchlight from a nearby village begins to emerge. Finally, the forest opens up around a towering cypress tree, revealing the illuminated settlement as the clear destination ahead.
